analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a website about black holes but lacks cohesive UI theming and animations. The event.json specifies a theme focused on black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The existing files need enhancement to create a visually immersive cosmic experience with smooth animations, dark themes, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Update the CSS to include a dark cosmic theme with gradient backgrounds, animated star fields, glowing black hole visuals, and smooth transitions. Add CSS animations for swirling effects around black holes and glowing elements to enhance the cosmic atmosphere.

Enhance the HTML structure by adding sections for animated slides about black holes, interactive elements like buttons to trigger animations, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon. Include placeholders for bulk animated objects that will represent cosmic phenomena.

Implement JavaScript functions to control animated slides, manage bulk animated objects (e.g., stars, planets, black hole effects), and handle user interactions. Add event listeners for navigation, slide transitions, and animations to create an engaging, interactive experience.
